task_completion.description: Log into the SEB Server at localhost:8080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard or interface is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the exam configurations list to view exam statuses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or table of exam configurations is visible in the SEB Server interface, showing columns that include the exam names and their current statuses (e.g., Active, Ready, Draft).

task_completion.description: Download the client configuration (.seb) files for exams with 'Active' or 'Ready' status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser download popups, download history, or context menus showing the downloading of .seb files specifically for exams marked as 'Active' or 'Ready'.

task_completion.description: Save or move the downloaded configuration files to the '~/Documents/ExamBackups/' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing the directory path '/home/ga/Documents/ExamBackups' containing the downloaded .seb files.

task_completion.description: Rename the downloaded files to replace any spaces in the exam name with underscores.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filenames of the .seb files in the ExamBackups directory contain underscores instead of spaces (e.g., 'Math_Final.seb' instead of 'Math Final.seb').

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the SEB Server GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (like Firefox or Chromium) is open and navigating the SEB Server web interface, rather than the agent using terminal curl commands to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The files were genuinely downloaded from the SEB Server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser download indicators or history match the files present in the backup directory, proving they were not just manually created empty files.

integrity.description: The agent did not download configurations for exams with Archived, Draft, or Hidden statuses.
integrity.visual_evidence: The backup directory and browser download history do NOT contain .seb files for any exams that were listed with Archived, Draft, or Hidden statuses in the SEB Server interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required backup directory is verified to be '/home/ga/Documents/ExamBackups'.
